---
output:
  beamer_presentation:
    template: presentation.tex
---

## Title slide



## Intro Slide 1
General overview of our dataset and the census?


## Intro Slide 2
Questions overview


## Intro Slide 3



## Question 1 Slide 1



## Question 1 Slide 2



## Question 1 Slide 3



## Question 2 Slide 1



## Question 2 Slide 2



## Question 2 Slide 3



## Question 3 Slide 1



## Question 3 Slide 2



## Obstacles



## Conclusion



## Further Directions
